match.userMessage:
Handheld wide cinematic shot holds steady with natural micro-movement at eye level. Scarlett stands at the water’s edge then smiles directly to camera before turning smoothly and walking along the wet shoreline. Gentle waves lap continuously at the sand. Warm low sunlight creates shifting rim light and faint lens flare as the frame tracks her slow movement rightward along the beach. Fabric edges flutter lightly in the coastal breeze while distant waves roll in the background.

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves lapping shore, light coastal breeze. soft footsteps on wet sand, subtle wave wash.
